name: Cheese-Topped Hash with Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 can (about 1 pound) beef or corned-beef hash
1 envelope (4 ounces) shredded sharp cheddar cheese
1 can (1 pound) sliced baby tomatoes, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef or corned-beef hash in a skillet.
2. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese.
3. Arrange the sliced baby tomatoes around the edge of the skillet.
4. Season with dried marjoram.
5. Cover and place over low heat until the cheese melts.
Makes 3 to 4 servings.
